name: superpowers-extended-cc
description: Claude Code-specific fork of Superpowers with native task management and CC-specific enhancements

interface.shortDescription: Planning, TDD, debugging, and delivery workflows for Claude Code (fork)
interface.longDescription: Use Superpowers Extended CC to guide agent work through brainstorming, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, and finish-the-branch workflows. Claude Code-specific fork with native task management.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
